text:
Created attachment 204994
scintilla-4.1.6.patch

* Update both to 4.1.6
* Update distinfo on both
* Add gnome to USES on both
* Update makefile patches on both
* Removed src/EditorConfig.cxx patch on editors/scite

Full changelog can be found here:
https://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

Tested with poudriere for 12-i386, 12-amd64, 11-i386 and 11-amd64. Passes portlint.

scite patch will be in the next update.
